app.title: RescueMind AI
app.subtitle: Barangay Disaster & Complaint Triage
landing.title: Barangay Triage System
landing.subtitle: Sistemang pina-pagana ning AI para keng malagua ampong eksaktung pamag-ruta da reng disaster at complaint reports ketang tamang ahensya ning gobierno.
landing.featuresDesc: Didisenyu para keng modernung barangay governance a atin AI at offline capability.
landing.categoriesDesc: Susuportan ngan deng karaniwan a report ning barangay.
landing.testimonialsDesc: Feedback ibat kareng gamit mi kareng miyayaliwang barangay.
landing.ctaDesc: Simulan ne ing pamag-report ning insidente king inyu barangay. Libre at malagua gamitan.
form.title: Mag-Report ning Insidente
form.description: Ilarawan ing insidente o reklamu king inyu barangay.
form.placeholder: Halimbawa: Matinding bayu king kanto ning Mabini St. at Rizal Ave., angga tuhod ing danum, kailangan ning rescue.
form.error.minLength: Paki-magbigay ning mas detalyadung paglalarawan (e dapat mababa ketang 10 karakter).
form.tip: Tip: Pindutan ing Ctrl + Enter para malagua yang makasumitir.
form.locationFailed: E malyaring matuklasan ing lokasyun. Mamili manu-manu king lalam.
loading.title: Susuri ya ing report...
loading.description: Prosesan ne ning AI ing report.
result.humanReview: Kailangan ning manual review — mababa ing lebel ning kumpiyansa.
disclaimer.text: Ing resultang iti AI-assisted classification la mu. Ing final action at routing responsibilidad ning barangay.
offline.title: Offline Mode
dashboard.title: Report Dashboard
dashboard.description: Kasalesayan da reng eganaganang na-submit a report.
error.generic: Atin meyangabing pirminan king pamag-proseso ning report. Paki-subukan pasibayu.
error.network: Ala koneksyon king server. Paki-subukan pasibayu.
auth.passwordHint: Ing password dapat e mababa ketang 6 a karakter
auth.successMsg: Milub ya ing confirmation link king email. Paki-lawen ing inbox (at spam folder).
auth.demoInfo: Demo: Gawa mu muna account, alis na lawen ing email (o i-disable ya ing email confirmation king Supabase Dashboard).
auth.loginDescription: Mamahala da reng report ning barangay
locale.label: Kapampangan
